description: A guest needs the concierge to arrange a car service to the airport for their departure tomorrow.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the guest's flight time, number of passengers, and luggage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all necessary details for the transport booking.

nodes.task_description: Contact the hotel's preferred car service vendor to book the transport.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books a sedan for the requested time.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the booking and price with the guest and offer to add the charge to their room folio.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all details and posts the charge to the guest's bill.
